form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. First-up ran last of 8 at Oaklawn Park on February 22 over 1207m, 11 len behind Spring Dancer carrying 53.5kg at $11.20. Second run from a spell made ground from midfield; 2nd of 9 at Turfway Park on March 11 over 1308m, 2.25 len behind Don't Say It with 56kg at $3.15. Unlikely to finish in the winner's circle.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 29-day let-up. Last start 6th of 8 at Turfway Park on March 11 over 1308m, 16 len behind Alta Avenue carrying 55.5kg at $8.80. The race before that second last of 8 at Turfway Park on January 14 over 1207m, 17 len behind Emily's Joy with 55.5kg at $4.15. Preferred in something easier.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last preparation post a big 4 len win. Belterra Park June 25 over 1207m defeating Our American Girl with 56.5kg at $14.80. When resuming last campaign third in a small field at Belterra Park May 22 over 1207m, 2.5 len behind E Kracker with 56.5kg at $2.10. Win would surprise.

form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. Comes here off a 46-day let-up. Most recently won by 0.5 len at Fairgrounds February 22 over 1207m defeating The Great Maybe with 51.5kg at $4.90. The race before that won by 12 len at Fairgrounds January 15 over 1207m defeating Lolita J with 54.5kg at $5.90. Impressive win last start and is in the mix again.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. Resuming tried to lead throughout but was claimed late 2nd of 8 at Turfway Park on February 12 over 1207m, 0.3 len behind Speighter Woman carrying 56kg at $3.03. Last start 2nd in a small field at Turfway Park on March 25 over 1207m, 0.5 len behind Modern Sound with 55kg at $2.81. Has the ability to take this out.

form.formComment: Resuming today after a break of three months. Finished off last campaign to post a big 5.5 len win. Mahoning Valley January 12 over 1207m defeating Popstyle with 56kg at $1.80. When resuming last campaign fourth of 7 at Horseshoe Indianapolis September 15 over 1207m, 1.5 len behind Vekomancer with 53.5kg at $3.10. Winning hope.

form.formComment: Filly back from a spell of three-and-a-half months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last preparation second last of 8 at Turfway Park January 2 over 1207m, 13 len behind Bilyana carrying 54.5kg at $16.48. Previously first up; second of 10 at Horseshoe Indianapolis April 23 over 1106m, 5.5 len behind De' Ans Eighty with 53.5kg at $33.40. Expect she will go well.
